CustomField.description: The API Name of the target SObject (e.g., Account, Opportunity). This is the "Source of Truth" used to instantiate the record in the Tescribe builder.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the exact API Name of the Salesforce object (e.g., Account, Opportunity). This determines the type of record Tescribe will create.
CustomField.label: Object API Name
